settings.siteTitle: It Starts With The Stars — Astrology & Tarot

daily.cosmicSummaryLine1: Moon in Taurus · Waxing Crescent · No Void Period Today
daily.cosmicSummaryLine2: Sun in Pisces · Saturn newly in Aries · Jupiter Rx in Cancer

retroAlert.title: ⚠ Mercury Retrograde begins February 25 · Pacific Time
retroAlert.body: Three days from now Mercury stations retrograde at 22° Pisces. Back up devices, delay signing contracts if you can, and give communications extra patience. Pre-shadow effects are already felt — review carefully before hitting send.

panels.body: The Moon settles into Taurus all day with no void period — a rarity that makes today unusually reliable for intention-setting and practical action. Taurus Moon calls us toward beauty, stillness, and the body. Slow down. Touch something real. The earth element asks: what are you actually building? Plant a seed today and it will hold.
panels.meta: Moon enters Gemini tomorrow · No void window today — a full green-light day

panels.body: Venus at 15° Pisces forms an exact trine to Jupiter Rx at 15° Cancer — the most beautiful aspect in the sky today and one of the most generous of the year. Heart-opening, abundance-inviting energy. Creative work initiated now carries unusual grace. Conversations about money, love, or beauty find easy flow. Jupiter retrograde asks: are you receiving what's already available to you?
panels.meta: Venus in Pisces · Jupiter Rx in Cancer · Water trine — flowing, receptive, fertile

panels.body: Two days ago Saturn met Neptune at 0° Aries — a conjunction that happens once every 36 years. We are still inside its reverb. The dreamer and the realist fused at the very first degree of Aries, the point of new beginnings. What vision are you being asked to make real? What illusion is dissolving into something more honest? This is the axis of sacred responsibility.
panels.meta: Exact Feb 20 · Still within 2° orb — deeply active energy

panels.body: With Venus trining Jupiter and the Moon in sensual Taurus, The Empress arrives exactly right. She is abundance embodied — creative power, fertile ground, the body as sacred. She asks you to stop striving and start receiving. What is ready to bloom if you stop forcing it? Today favors the arts, nature, pleasure without guilt, and trusting that growth happens even when you are not watching.
panels.meta: Venus rules both Taurus and The Empress — a doubled invitation today

sourceCredit.text: ✦ Planetary timing referenced from Llewellyn's 2026 Daily Planetary Guide · Pacific Time ✦

items.name: Tarot Reading
items.tagline: The cards reveal what the heart already knows
items.description: A focused 60-minute tarot session exploring your current energies, a specific question, or a full Celtic Cross spread for an aerial view of your path.
features: One-on-one via Zoom or in person

items.name: Birth Chart Deep Dive
items.tagline: The full map of who you came here to be
items.description: A comprehensive 90-minute natal chart analysis — sun, moon, rising, planetary placements, aspects, and life timing through progressions and transits.

items.name: Relationship Synastry
items.tagline: Why you found each other — and what it means
items.description: A 90-minute synastry and composite chart reading for couples or business partners. Understand your connection at the cosmic level.

items.name: Bundle: The Trilogy
items.tagline: Past · Present · Future — the full picture
items.description: Three sessions across 90 days: natal chart, midpoint tarot check-in, and a forward-looking solar return reading. The most transformative offering.

items.name: Group Session
items.description: A 2-hour group reading for up to 8 people. Each participant gets a mini personal reading plus a group tarot spread for the collective energy.

items.name: Monthly Membership
items.description: Monthly new moon intentions, full moon release tarot, private community access, and 20% off all individual sessions.

parties.lead: Imagine a dinner party where the conversation goes deeper than small talk — because the stars are guiding it. Tarot at your table turns any gathering into an unforgettable evening.

options.name: The Dinner Party Experience
options.description: 2–3 hours of readings woven through a multi-course evening. Guests drop in for private mini-readings between courses.

options.name: Cocktail Party Tarot
options.description: Perfect for birthdays, bachelorettes, and holiday parties. 3-hour event with tarot, astrology Q&A, and a group party spread.

options.name: Birthday Solar Return
options.description: A special reading mapping the entire year ahead. The ideal centerpiece of a birthday gathering — a gift that lasts all year.

options.name: Corporate & Team Events
options.description: Astrology as a team-building lens — collective energy, communication styles, and how planetary cycles map to project timelines.

booking.subtitle: All sessions confirmed within 24 hours. Secure payment via Stripe.

items.quote: She described exactly what I'd been feeling for months in a way I couldn't articulate myself. I left that session knowing what to do next.

items.quote: We had tarot at our dinner party and it was the most memorable evening any of us could remember. People are still talking about their readings six months later.

items.quote: The Trilogy Bundle changed how I understand myself. Three sessions across three months tracked my actual life in ways that felt almost uncanny.
items.author: Daniel K.
